instruct: Calm, precise male documentary narrator, mid-low register, measured newsreader trust. Present tense storytelling with real pauses: a beat after each reveal, a longer beat before chapter turns. Slightly tighter pace during escalation, settling quiet and thoughtful at the end with falling cadence. Dry humor read completely straight. Quoted dialogue gets a subtle cadence shift, never a character voice.

aaaflow_mapping.note: speed assumes ~160 wpm raw TTS output; verify against first take and retune
